emergency_routing_rules: Transfer directly to our emergency dispatch number
non_emergency_routing_rules: office staff answers calls and creates service tickets
call_transfer_rules: The AI should collect the caller’s name, phone number, and address and notify dispatch
integration_constraints: never create sprinkler jobs automatically in ServiceTrade
after_hours_flow_summary: office phones forward to a technician
office_hours_flow_summary: office staff answers calls and creates service tickets
